window.title: Drill Plan
window.closeDuringRun: A drill run is in progress. Close this window anyway? The machine will keep running.

summary.keepoutSkipped_one: {{count}} board hole in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_few: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_many: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_other: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.registrationInKeepout: Registration holes in clamp zone ({{count}}) — move the registration hole or the clamp

toolbar.selectionHint: Highlighted = what's selected in the plan on the right

workzero.title: Work Zero
workzero.hint: Jog the panel corner over the table and bind XY. Z is taken per-bit separately.
workzero.notZeroedHint: Bind work zero (XY) at the datum corner
workzero.xyOutOfBounds: Work zero is off — at this position some holes run past the machine travel ({{detail}}). Re-bind closer to the machine origin or change the datum corner.
workzero.zDoesNotFit: Z doesn't fit the travel: {{detail}}. Adjust the depth / tool-change Z / Z envelope.
workzero.zTouchHint: Taken per bit — at start and on each tool change.

zeroMethod.title: Work zero
zeroMethod.sectionLabel: How to register the board to the table
zeroMethod.explainFooter: Methods 2–3 measure both the offset and the rotation of the board — the blank doesn't need to lie perfectly straight, skew is compensated in software.
zeroMethod.startHint: Bind the work zero — pick a method in the card above
zeroMethod.skewAdvice: This method does not compensate blank skew — for double-sided boards use methods 2–3.

methodDesc.1: Jog the bit into the board corner and zero there. Fast; the blank must lie straight.
methodDesc.2: Drive onto 2+ alignment points and capture each. Blank skew goes away.
methodDesc.3: A 3D touch probe finds the centres of 2+ holes by itself. Highest accuracy.

card.overrun: At this zero some holes run past the machine travel

blocked.disconnected: Machine not connected — connect it in the Equipment tab.
blocked.busy: Machine busy ({{state}}) — wait for it to finish.

tableMap.label: Board on the bed
tableMap.caption: travel {{w}} × {{h}} · click to bring zero here
tableMap.overflow: Past machine travel {{detail}}. Bring the zero closer to the origin or change the datum corner.

zero.bindRejected: Zero rejected by the machine ({{error}}) — not set. Re-position and bind again.

toolChange.ck2Probe: Check the probe circuit and set Z on the copper
toolChange.ck2Manual: Lower Z to the copper and confirm
toolChange.ck3First: Turn on the spindle and start
toolChange.ck3Change: Turn on the spindle and continue
toolChange.probeStep1Hint: Touch the probe to the bit — we'll confirm the circuit closes. Otherwise probing on copper won't work.
toolChange.probeStep1Btn: Touch the probe to the bit
toolChange.probeOpen: No contact — touch the probe to the bit
toolChange.probeReady: Probe circuit closed — ready to set Z
toolChange.probeStep2Hint: The probe will touch the copper and take zero automatically
toolChange.probeShorted: Probe is shorted — detach before probing
toolChange.zEditHint: Click to type an exact Z height — the machine jogs there
toolChange.manualBarHint: Lower Z to the copper (buttons or step). Taken per bit — at start and on each tool change.
toolChange.manualFail: Couldn't set Z — check the machine connection
toolChange.zoneTooLow: Too low — raise the bit into the dark zone
toolChange.zoneTooHigh: Too high — lower the bit into the dark zone
toolChange.zTooLowMsg: There isn't enough Z travel below the zero for the cut (need {{needed}}, available {{available}}). Re-zero higher, or move the board up.
toolChange.zTooHighMsg: There isn't enough Z travel above the zero: the rapid to safe height and tool change would overshoot the top of travel by {{over}} and hit the limit. Re-zero lower, or move the board down.

run.stopTitle: Graceful stop — finishes the current hole and lifts to safe height
run.cancelStopTitle: Change your mind and keep running — while the machine finishes the current hole
run.estopTitle: Immediate halt — machine stops without a safe-Z move
run.errorHint: Unlock the machine, then start again.
run.zeroHint: Work zero (0,0) is the selected datum corner of the panel (marked on the canvas; X right, Y up). Set it by jogging in Equipment → Control tab.
run.spindleHint: If the spindle is on a manual dial (3018 default), turn it on by hand — handy during the tool-change pause.

wizard2.notHomed: Machine is not homed. Run homing ($H) so machine coordinates are valid before capturing points.
wizard2.spreadHint: The farther apart the points, the more precisely the rotation is computed. Points are placed beforehand in the panel editor; the panel corners are available with no preparation.
wizard2.hintFirst: Bring the tool tip exactly onto the point — with the jog pad or by clicking the table. Then capture.
wizard2.hintNext: The approximate board offset is already known — press "Navigate", then fine-tune with small steps.
wizard2.zHint: Use Z− to descend slowly (slow feed). Track click only raises Z.
wizard2.captureTooFar: Come within {{mm}} mm of the target to capture
